ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AGAINST PLAINTIFF. COURT DATE IS OCT.6,1993. PLEASE REFER TO THE REGISTER OF ACTION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHOENBERGER ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BASSEGHI NADER $577.78 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.78, PLTF TO RETURN MERCHANDISE UPON RECEIPT OF PAYMENT IN FULL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
